title: Palembang、South Sumatra — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Palembang、South Sumatra的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Palembang是South Sumatra的一個城市，人口約1,708,000。South Sumatra’s capital and one of Indonesia’s oldest cities, known for its Ampera Bridge and pempek cuisine.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
